DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR WALTER HERBERT WALKER.
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-01-2008 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212

PLAINTIFF PHILIP COX'S MOTION TO VACATE ORDER FOR ARBITRATION IS SCHEDULED THIS DAY. THERE BEING NO APPEARANCE NOR AN OBJECTION, THE TENTATIVE RULING TO GRANT THE MOTION IS ADOPTED. MOTION IS ORDERED GRANTED. ORDER IS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. THE COURT ORDERED THE CASE SET FOR A JURY TRIAL ON 11/03/2008 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 206. THE COURT TO GIVE NOTICE OF THE TRIAL DATE AND THE MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. THE COURT FURTHER ORDERED A MEDIATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SCHEDULED ON 7/23/2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPARTMENT 212. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: LETICIA PEREZ, CSR#7782 (212)

Notice Of Motion To Vacate Order For Arbitration
Off Calendar May-01-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff Philip Cox's Motion to Vacate Order for Arbitration is scheduled this day. There being no appearance nor an objection, the tentative ruling to grant the motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Order is signed in open court. The court ordered the case set for a Jury Trial on 11/03/2008 at 9:30 AM in Department 206. The court to give notice of the Trial Date and the Mandatory Settlement Conference. The court further ordered a Mediation Order to Show Cause scheduled on 7/23/2008 at 10:00 AM in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Leticia Perez, CSR#7782 (212)
